name: LLaMA-Factory
pricing_notes: Fully open source (Apache 2.0); no API costs; GPU compute is the cost

auth.notes: CLI and Python library; HuggingFace token for model download

performance.notes: Flash Attention 2 + Unsloth optional backends for faster training; 100+ models supported

agent_readiness.notes: Unified LLM fine-tuning framework supporting 100+ models. CLI + Web UI (LlamaBoard). Supports SFT, LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, KTO, ORPO, SimPO. Multi-GPU via DeepSpeed. Very wide model support (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, Yi, Baichuan, ChatGLM, etc.). Popular in Chinese ML community but widely used globally. One of the most starred fine-tuning repos on GitHub.

gotchas: Documentation primarily in Chinese with some English translation
Web UI (LlamaBoard) is convenient but less reproducible than config files
Less tested edge cases in non-mainstream model architectures
Rapid development means frequent changes and occasional instability
best_when: Widest model support needed (100+ architectures including Chinese models)
Web UI-based fine-tuning experiments via LlamaBoard
Multi-algorithm comparison (SFT, DPO, KTO, ORPO in one framework)
Teams working with Qwen, Yi, Baichuan, ChatGLM models
avoid_when: Teams prioritizing documentation quality over feature breadth
Production ML pipelines requiring highly stable APIs
summary: LLaMA-Factory is a unified LLM fine-tuning framework supporting 100+ model architectures including many Chinese models (Qwen, Yi, Baichuan, ChatGLM). Supports SFT, LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, KTO, ORPO, SimPO. CLI + LlamaBoard web UI. One of the most-starred fine-tuning repositories globally. Best for widest model support and algorithm variety. Documentation quality is mixed; English docs are improving.
